note: Issue #164 211 runtime-only rollout evidence for the e7558cc runtime subject after PR #202. The live API/worker containers use ai-platform:e7558cc-issue164-current-main-runtime-only-v2 with matching runtime subject, runtime source marker, OCI revision, and hyphen/underscore source-revision labels.
